texto: I like playing around with the words
autor: I love it when I feel like I've picked the exact right word to describe whatever it is I'm trying to describe.
explicacao: Citação de I love it when I feel like I've picked the exact right word to describe whatever it is I'm trying to describe. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I like playing around with the words” articula reflexao, margaret-peterson-haddix, playing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
